segments.text: Lord, why are you so distant? Why do you hide from me in times of trouble?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The wicked chase down the poor with impunity. May they be trapped by the evil schemes they themselves invented.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For the wicked boast about what they want to do. They praise the greedy, but treat the Lord with contempt.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The wicked are too proud to come to God. In all their thinking they never consider God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: What they do always seems to go well. They're unaware of God's judgments. They ridicule all their enemies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They tell themselves,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Nothing bad is going to happen to me. I'll never be in trouble!
segments.speaker: Wicked

segments.text: Their speech is full of cursing, lies, and threats; their tongues are always ready to spread trouble and cause evil.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They hide out in ambush in the villages, ready to kill innocent passers-by. They are always on the lookout for their next victim.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They lie in ambush like a lion ready to attack, ready to leap out from their hiding place to seize their victim. They capture the helpless, throwing a net over them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Their victims are knocked down, laid low.  They fall under the strength of the wicked.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They tell themselves,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: God won't notice. He's looking the other way. He won't ever see anything.
segments.speaker: Wicked

segments.text: Take a st and, Lord! Raise your hand to strike! Don't forget those who can't defend themselves.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Why do the wicked think they can treat God with such contempt? Why do they think that God won't make them accountable?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But you do see the trouble and grief they cause. Take it into your own hands. The helpless trust in you; you defend the orphans.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Destroy the power of the wicked, those evil people! Call each of them to account until there are none left!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Lord, you are King forever and ever! The nations will vanish from their lands.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Lord, you have heard the longing cries of those who are suffering. You will encourage them, for you will listen to them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You will defend the rights of orphans and the oppressed so that those who are mere human beings here on earth will never terrorize them again.
